name: Phil Conrad Kirundi
title: Data Analyst, Data Scientist & Power BI Developer
role: Data Analyst & Data Scientist & Power BI Developer
bio: Data Scientist and AI Evaluation Specialist with a strong foundation in Python, machine learning, and data pipeline development. Experienced in building end-to-end ML pipelines, developing Power BI dashboards, and evaluating AI-generated outputs. Passionate about applying machine learning techniques to real-world problems and translating complex datasets into clear, actionable insights.
aboutLong: Data Scientist and AI Evaluation Specialist based in Nairobi, Kenya, with a strong foundation in Python, machine learning, and data pipeline development. I combine hands-on experience in model building, data validation, and AI output evaluation with practical skills in Power BI dashboard automation and SQL analytics. Currently contributing to AI model evaluation at Turing while continuously building data solutions that translate complex datasets into clear, actionable insights for stakeholders.
